name: audio-alerts
description: Custom audio alerts for Gemini CLI (macOS/Linux), handling Tool Permissions, Errors, and Task Completion with themed sound packs (retro, portal, default, hero, premium).

settings.name: Enable Audio Alerts
settings.description: Enable or disable audio alerts. When disabled, no sounds or TTS will play.

settings.name: Display Theme
settings.description: Select the audio theme (retro, portal, default, hero, premium).
